founder.name: Paul Iyogun
founder.vision: To be remembered as the guy who used code to walk pilgrims through Scripture.
founder.guiding_principle: Scripture is the destination. Technology is only the road.
founder.title: Founder and Chief Architect

project_identity.name: GeoAware Bible
project_identity.guiding_question: Does this help the pilgrim walk the Word?
project_identity.philosophy: Use technology with reverence to help pilgrims encounter Scripture through geography, language, history, and thoughtful design.

mission: Help pilgrims walk through Scripture with greater awareness of geography, language, history, and reverent design while keeping Scripture as the primary experience.
geoaware_os_rule: All future features must preserve GeoAware OS while keeping Scripture central to GeoAware Bible.
engineering_principles: AI assists but never replaces biblical study.
Maps reveal context rather than becoming distractions.
Animations must be subtle and meaningful.
Every commit should have a clear architectural purpose.
non_goals: Do not optimize for screen time.
Do not prioritize visual spectacle over Scripture.
Do not use copyrighted Bible text without verified permission.

goals: Upgrade the Living Earth visual layer.
Preserve GeoPrayer and Scripture Passport foundations.
guardrails: Do not use copyrighted Bible text.
Do not optimize for screen time.
Do not prioritize visual spectacle over Scripture.

roadmap.focus: AI Guide and contextual Scripture journey

acceptance_criteria: No app behavior changes without explicit product intent.
next_focus: AI Guide and contextual Scripture journey
